steps.title: Apply the geologic rule
steps.content: The first sentence states the principle: an intrusion is younger than the rocks it cuts through. The second sentence applies that principle to date an intrusion relative to the Tournaisian and Gzhelian rock layers.

steps.title: Choose logical consequence
steps.content: B merely adds information, C signals purpose, and D signals contrast. The second sentence follows as a result of the rule in the first sentence, so "Accordingly" supplies the right relationship. The answer is A.
